title: Woodluv Oval Antique Wash Willow Wicker Picnic Hamper Shopping Storage Basket W/Handle - 39.5cm x 30cm x 37.5(H) cm
features: Oval Lidded Willow Basket with Carry Handle
Multi use general storage for any room in the House, Cloth Lining Protects Contents
Product Dimenstions - 40 x 30 x 18cm height Without handle & 40cm height with Handle
description: Product Description Style Meets Function: Lidded Wicker Picnic Basket for Discerning Picnickers Introducing the epitome of outdoor elegance: our Lidded Wicker Picnic Basket. Crafted with meticulous attention to detail, this basket is not just a vessel for your culinary delights; it's a statement piece that elevates any picnic experience. Essential Picnic OR Day-Out Companion Elevate Your Outdoor Experience: Lidded Wicker Picnic Basket Versatile and adaptable, our lidded Wicker picnic basket transcends its traditional purpose. Beyond picnics, it serves as a stylish storage solution for blankets, books, or even as a charming centrepiece for your home decor. With its removable liner and sturdy construction, it effortlessly transitions from outdoor adventures to indoor organization, making it a must-have for every lifestyle. Picnic Basket with Removable Liner Picnic Perfection: Carry Your Culinary Creations in Style Perfect to store delectable treats when you are strolling through sun-dappled meadows or sandy shores. Its woven wicker construction exudes rustic charm, while the lidded design ensures your goodies stay secure and fresh until you're ready to indulge. What sets our picnic basket apart is a removable liner that makes cleaning a breeze, allowing you to effortlessly maintain its pristine appearance. Plus, the easy carry handle ensures you can transport your picnic essentials with comfort and ease. Rustic Charm: Lidded Wicker Picnic Basket for Elegant Outdoor Experience Gather your loved ones, pack your favorite delicacies, and embark on unforgettable picnics with our Liided Wicker Picnic Basket. It's not just a basket; it's an invitation to savor life's simple pleasures in style.
